title: Modules Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the modules family — SPFx webpart and module declarations, visibility, role gating, and per-stage availability. Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 4 — Per-Family Schema Population). HBI Assistant module remains deferred from MVP — module entry exists as `mvp_status: deferred` placeholder only. Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §15, §16.
